title: Serino 2015 front/back peri-trunk Experiment 2
citation: Serino, A., Noel, J. P., Galli, G., Canzoneri, E., Marmaroli, P., Lissek, H., & Blanke, O. (2015). Body part-centered and full body-centered peripersonal space representations. Scientific Reports, 5, 18603.
notes: Front/back trunk mapping with sounds crossing the body. Current renderer can draw/render a linear pass-through path, but block-specific front/back tactile mapping is simplified.

reference_parameters.reported_speed_note: paper discusses faster trajectory than Experiment 1; current profile uses 35 cm/s approximation

provenance.source: Scientific Reports Experiment 2 reports tactile stimulation at 14 delays mapping 5-95 cm in front and back.
The original used speaker arrays; this profile approximates with one linear 3D path.
